sample_1.prompt: A focused young professional woman sitting at a clean, organized desk, carefully reviewing documents with a fine-tipped pen in hand. She wears glasses and smart business casual attire. Every item on the desk — papers, sticky notes, pens — is neatly arranged. Warm office lighting with soft bokeh background. Photorealistic style, shallow depth of field, warm tones, cinematic composition.

sample_2.prompt: A meticulous middle-aged man sitting at a tidy desk, carefully writing entries into a large open ledger book with a fountain pen. Beside him are neatly labeled folders, color-coded tabs, and a perfectly organized filing system. His expression is calm and focused. Soft natural light from a window illuminates the scene. Photorealistic style, shallow depth of field, cool-neutral tones, cinematic composition.

sample_3.prompt: A professional chef in a pristine white uniform leaning over a restaurant plate, using tweezers to place a delicate garnish with extreme precision. The dish is an artistic arrangement of colorful ingredients on a minimalist white plate. The kitchen background is softly blurred with warm ambient lighting. Photorealistic style, shallow depth of field, rich warm tones, cinematic close-up composition.
